```{python}

import pandas as pd
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

tips = pd.read_csv("data/datasets/tips.csv")
planets = pd.read_csv("data/datasets/planets.csv")
titanic = pd.read_csv("data/datasets/titanic.csv")
iris = pd.read_csv("data/datasets/iris.csv")

print(tips.to_string())

plt.clf() # Used to clear a current figure

sns.scatterplot(x='tip', y="total_bill", data=tips, hue="day", size='size', palette="YlGnBu")

sns.histplot(tips['tip'], kde=True, bins=20)

sns.barplot(x="sex", y="tip", data=tips, palette="YlGnBu")

sns.distplot(tips['tip'], kde=True, bins=15) # don't use this graphic

sns.boxplot(x="day", y="tip", data=tips, hue="sex", palette="YlGnBu")

sns.stripplot(x="day", y="tip", data=tips, hue="sex", palette="YlGnBu"

sns.jointplot(x="tip", y="total_bill", data=tips, kind='hex', cmap="YlGnBu")

plt.show() 


```

```{python}

titanic

sns.heatmap(titanic.corr(numeric_only=True), annot=True, cmap="icefire")



```

```{python}

iris

sns.clustermap(iris.drop("species", axis=1))




```

```{python}

import pandas as pd
import numpy as np

a = np.array([10, 20, 30])
b = np.array([40, 50, 60])
c = np.array([70, 80, 90])

# df = pd.DataFrame(columns=([a, b, c]))
# df.rename(columns=[a, b, c])
# print(df.to_string())

df2 = pd.DataFrame({'E': [1, 2, 3], 'F': ['d', 'e', 'f']})

df1 = pd.DataFrame(columns={'A': [10, 20, 30], 'B': [40, 50, 60], 'C': ['a' ,'b', 'c'], 'D': [True, False, True,], 'E': [df2]})





```
